name: an-dr-git
description: Cross-platform desktop Git client scaffold for Electron, React, and TypeScript.
author: an-dr-vibe

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.package:dir: npm run clean:artifacts && npm run build && electron-forge package
scripts.package:verify: npm run package:dir && node scripts/verify-artifacts.mjs package
scripts.make:win: npm run clean:artifacts && npm run build && electron-forge make --platform win32
scripts.make:verify:win: npm run make:win && node scripts/verify-artifacts.mjs make-win32
scripts.make:deb: npm run clean:artifacts && npm run build && electron-forge make --platform linux
scripts.make:verify:deb: npm run make:deb && node scripts/verify-artifacts.mjs make-linux
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:spec && npm run app:smoke
